title: Friendly Teleport
description: Vanilla PVE friendly way to teleport to other players.
body:
![FRIENDLY TELEPORT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c97409d21e1b6d0f0c742ffa5049196e93794e8.png)

A small mod that makes playing with your friends easier by making you able to teleport to the nearest player while keeping it vanilla friendly.

You will need to craft or buy from a wandering villager Wormhole Eyes that teleport you to the nearest player for the price of a small amount of health.

![The Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32131b7b88526db3fafa70e68df97d89c26c5c40.png)

Then you can brew a Wormhole Potion with a Wormhole Eye in a Brewing Stand with Water Bottles. The Wormhole Potion teleports you without the damage.

![Wormhole Potion Brewing Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47c85bb2a7981fe8a91ae6b0329e0915ccee93b8.png)![Wormhole Potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54d03875c430e0ecb906a1dc21f5e858033661f8.png)

When you use one of both items you get Wormhole Fatigue for 5 minutes. If you have this effect you can not use any wormhole.

![Wormhole Fatigue Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0cb7501c30fcf90b15d07efbdf6cdbdd5e6150e.png)

And if you are playing with more than 2 players on the server you might need the Wormhole Catalyst.

![Wormhole Catalyst Crafting Recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3dbdbc9e7a468a6bdf90e958176dc8471d5658b.png)

When activated you get the Wormhole Catalysis effect. If a player has this effect the other players teleporting with a wormhole will be teleported to them.

![Wormhole Catalysis Effect Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23b58f35139f884cbd02b6bf15ca2318d26bac28.png)

Enjoy and let me know if you have any ideas on the comments or my discord server !

This Mod was made using Mcreator.
